title: Quality Rule Entity
description: JSON Schema for Quality Rule entity in customer workspace. Quality rules are reusable assertions that measure data quality metrics.

quality_rule_id.description: Unique identifier for the quality rule

organization_id.description: Organization that owns this quality rule

data_product_id.description: Reference to data product this rule applies to (null for reusable rules)

condition.description: SQL-like expression or validation condition (e.g., 'field IS NOT NULL', 'field > 0')

threshold.description: Threshold value for the rule (e.g., 0.95 for 95% completeness)

error_message.description: Custom error message when rule fails

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the quality rule

created_by.description: User ID who created the quality rule

updated_by.description: User ID who last updated the quality rule

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when quality rule was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when quality rule was last updated

deleted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when quality rule was deleted (soft delete)
